phase: Phase 11 of ledger system buildout — first ledger authored under DEC-2026-04-29-013 envelope-aware rule
core_rule: Before changing information, know where the truth lives.
tiebreaker_authority: When source-of-truth rules conflict across surfaces, this ledger wins.

client_truth.rule: STRATEGY DRAFT — subordinate to all above

external_system_truth.source: local mirror in the file tree

binding_rules: If a file looks generated, find the generator before editing.
Editing generated output as if it were canonical is a Done-Gate failure.
today.html and master_ledger.csv are views of state, not state itself.
Cache-busted JS bundle references inside Secretary.html are managed by bumping numbers, not by editing the bundles.

plans_vs_comms.rule: The plan is not truth. The box is truth.
implications: A plan does not override guardrails, current state, replies, approvals, or comms.
A meaningful client reply makes a plan stale until reviewed.
Plans authored before guardrail enforcement may carry unsafe executable copy — re-validate before plan-driven sends.

allowed_to_know_schema.purpose: Closes the schema-design portion of PROB-2026-04-28-001. The four-bucket Wholesome Enrichment model becomes a per-Client-Box schema automation can read.

comms_confirmed.definition: Facts the client actually said in comms (Close transcripts, emails, SMS, WhatsApp, calls, voicemails).

internal_strategy.definition: Useful internal context for planning — pulled from enrichment, profile, public sources.
internal_strategy.rule: May shape phrasing but never quoted.

protected.definition: Off-limits facts (sensitive personal info, household composition specifics, religious/political affiliation, immigration status, medical, etc.).
protected.approval_needed: hard refusal — never customer-facing even with approval

approval_required.definition: Operator-decided facts or actions that need a human green-light before any send (fee waivers, discounts, pricing claims, scope promises, guarantees, guest-count commitments).
approval_required.rule: Isolated approval card per DEC-2026-04-28-005 — never batched.

rules: A fact lives in exactly one bucket. If it's both confirmed and sensitive, the protected bucket wins.
Customer-facing copy may reference items from comms_confirmed and approval_required (only when approved: true).
Customer-facing copy may not reference items from internal_strategy directly — only let strategy items shape phrasing.
Items in protected never appear in any send, ever, regardless of approval.
A new fact discovered during a session lands in internal_strategy by default. Promotion to comms_confirmed requires a citable comms source.

remaining_close_criteria: At least one Client Box uses it
Scheduled-fire / read protocol checks it before composing
Wholesome Enrichment principle in NORTH_STAR.md §6 mechanically enforced

conflict_resolution: Walk the universal ordering. Higher rank wins.
If both sources are at the same rank, prefer the more recent.
If both equally recent, prefer the one closer to the original system of record.
If still ambiguous, mark as Open Problems entry (PROB-YYYY-MM-DD-XXX) and either escalate or proceed with the safer view.
Never silently merge. Log which one you picked and why.

update_protocol_when_truth_shifts.trigger: Promoting a file from generated → canonical, or demoting from canonical → generated.
required_updates: this ledger §3 per-domain table for the affected domain
GLOBAL_LEDGER.md §4 (point at this ledger; do not duplicate)
DECISIONS_LEDGER.md if affects more than one Box

relationship_to_box_bus.validation_rule: A Box's primary must be a file ranked at the top of its domain's trust ordering. A Box's generated list must include every owned file classified as derived under §3.6.

related_ledgers.global_summary: GLOBAL_LEDGER.md §4 (8 headline rules — should reference this ledger as canonical home from Phase 11 forward)

update_triggers: new domain added that needs its own trust ordering
Allowed-To-Know schema gains a new bucket or rule
new external system added (cross-link Connections Ledger when it lands)
Decisions Ledger entry creates a new source-of-truth claim

history.event: Phase 11 — initial creation. First ledger authored under DEC-2026-04-29-013 envelope-aware rule (declares tier: global, references BOX_BUS_LEDGER §2.1). Consolidated rules from Global §4, NS-06, FDL §6, DoD §5.5, and Wholesome Enrichment principle. Allowed-To-Know schema codified — closes PROB-2026-04-28-001 schema-design close-criterion. Companion files: SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.json, VISUALS/source_of_truth_flow.mmd. Companion Communications entry: COMM-2026-04-29-008.
